leadText: Sand Force (Japanese: すなのちから Sand Force) is an Ability introduced in Generation V.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] During a sandstorm , Sand Force increases the power of Rock -, Ground -, and Steel-type moves used by the Pokémon with this Ability by 30%. A Pokémon with this Ability will take no damage from the sandstorm if it otherwise would. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Sand Force has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] During a sandstorm , Sand Force increases the power of Rock -, Ground -, and Steel-type moves used by the Pokémon with this Ability by 30%. A Pokémon with this Ability will take no damage from the sandstorm if it otherwise would.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD GtI Sandstorm weather makes the Pokémon's Rock-, Ground-, and Steel-type moves stronger. * The Pokémon isn't damaged by the Sandstorm weather condition, and the power of its Rock-, Ground-, and Steel-type moves goes up! * S MD The Pokémon isn't damaged by a sandstorm, and the power of its Rock-, Ground-, and Steel-type moves goes up while the sandstorm is in effect! MD RT DX The Pokémon isn't damaged by the Sandstorm weather condition, and the power of its Rock-, Ground-, and Steel-type moves goes up while a sandstorm is in effect.
